content:
# Final Review Aggregate

**Summary:** Final review accepted 1 amendment(s); restart required.
**Restart Required:** true
**Force Completed:** false
**Total Reviewers:** 2
**Unique Amendments:** 4
**Final Review Restarts:** 22/25

## Accepted

- `fr-22-fc433550`

## Rejected

- `fr-22-bfc33b6c`
- `fr-22-4eda4a65`
- `fr-22-5a0fcfa3`

## Disputed

None.

## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-22-fc433550`

Handle explicit-id aliases when validating and verifying `mapped_to_bead_id`. The prompt builder canonicalizes explicit bead IDs to `milestone_id.short_id` in [src/cli/project.rs:1179](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/cli/project.rs#L1179), `extract_pe_bead_ids` and final-review validation only accept that exact token from the prompt in [src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs:277](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs#L277) and [src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:648](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs#L648), and `verify_bead_exists` later passes the stored value straight to `br show` in [src/contexts/automation_runtime/planned_elsewhere.rs:70](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/automation_runtime/planned_elsewhere.rs#L70). For explicit beads that still exist in `.beads` under their authored short ID, a valid planned-elsewhere mapping will be treated as stale and its comment will never post. Resolve both the qualified and short-ID forms here; the alias requirement is already acknowledged in [src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs:494](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs#L494).
